message: Operation 'listFeatureClassNames' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is somewhat vague about what 'Open SGID table names' are and doesn't clarify that this is a discovery/metadata operation with no required parameters. Enhanced description explains the operation's purpose as a discovery mechanism and clarifies that it returns the complete inventory of searchable layers.

data.current_description: Returns a list of Open SGID table names usable by the search endpoint.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of all available Open SGID table names that can be queried using the search endpoint. This operation requires no parameters and provides the complete inventory of searchable feature classes, enabling discovery of available spatial data layers.
